steps.title: Clarify regional authenticity
steps.content: The first clause says the cheeses are valued for regional authenticity. The second clause explains what that means: they are made with local ingredients and methods typical of their geographic regions.

steps.title: Reject nonclarifying signals
steps.content: Choice B would signal contrast, Choice C would signal correction, and Choice D would signal sequence or consequence. The relationship is clarification, so the transition should mean "in other words." The answer is A.
